contentBlocks.original:
विष्णुपत्नि जगन्मातः विष्णुवक्षस्थलस्थिते ।
पद्मासने पद्महस्ते पद्मावति नमोऽस्तु ते ॥ 1 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
viṣṇupatni jaganmātaḥ viṣṇuvakṣasthalasthitē ।
padmāsanē padmahastē padmāvati namō'stu tē ॥ 1 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O wife of Viṣṇu, O mother of the world, O you who dwell on Viṣṇu's chest — O you who are seated on a lotus, who hold a lotus in your hand — salutations to you, Padmāvatī.
contentBlocks.meanings: viṣṇu-patnī: wife of Viṣṇu | jagat-mātaḥ: O mother of the world | viṣṇu-vakṣasthala-sthite: dwelling on Viṣṇu's chest | padma-āsane: seated on a lotus | padma-haste: holding a lotus in hand | padmāvati: O Padmāvatī | namo'stu te: salutations to you

contentBlocks.original:
वेङ्कटेशप्रिये पूज्ये क्षीराब्दितनये शुभे ।
पद्मेरमे लोकमातः पद्मावति नमोऽस्तु ते ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vēṅkaṭēśapriyē pūjyē kṣīrābditanayē śubhē ।
padmēramē lōkamātaḥ padmāvati namō'stu tē ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O beloved of Vēṅkaṭēśa, O worthy of worship, O daughter of the milk-ocean, O auspicious one — O Padmā, O Ramā, O mother of the world — salutations to you, Padmāvatī.
contentBlocks.meanings: veṅkaṭeśa-priye: beloved of Vēṅkaṭēśa | pūjye: worthy of worship | kṣīrābdhi-tanaye: daughter of the milk-ocean | śubhe: auspicious | padme: O Padmā (lotus-born) | rame: O Ramā (pleasing one, Lakṣmī) | loka-mātaḥ: O mother of the world

contentBlocks.original:
कल्याणी कमले कान्ते कल्याणपुरनायिके ।
कारुण्यकल्पलतिके पद्मावति नमोऽस्तु ते ॥ 3 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kaḻyāṇī kamalē kāntē kaḻyāṇapuranāyikē ।
kāruṇyakalpalatikē padmāvati namō'stu tē ॥ 3 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O auspicious Kalyāṇī, O lotus-born Kamale, O beautiful Kānte, O queen of Kalyāṇapura — O wish-fulfilling creeper of compassion — salutations to you, Padmāvatī.
contentBlocks.meanings: kalyāṇī: auspicious one | kamale: O lotus-born | kānte: O beautiful one | kalyāṇa-pura-nāyike: queen of Kalyāṇapura | kāruṇya-kalpa-latike: wish-fulfilling creeper of compassion

contentBlocks.original:
सहस्रदलपद्मस्थे कोटिचन्द्रनिभानने ।
पद्मपत्रविशालाक्षी पद्मावति नमोऽस्तु ते ॥ 4 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sahasradaḻapadmasthē kōṭichandranibhānanē ।
padmapatraviśālākṣī padmāvati namō'stu tē ॥ 4 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Dwelling on the thousand-petaled lotus, whose face rivals a crore of moons in beauty, with eyes broad as lotus petals — salutations to you, Padmāvatī.
contentBlocks.meanings: sahasra-dala-padma-stha: dwelling on the thousand-petaled lotus | koṭi-candra-nibha-ānana: face resembling ten million moons | padma-patra-viśāla-akṣī: with eyes broad as lotus petals

contentBlocks.original:
सर्वज्ञे सर्ववरदे सर्वमङ्गलदायिनी ।
सर्वसम्मानिते देवी पद्मावति नमोऽस्तु ते ॥ 5 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvajñē sarvavaradē sarvamaṅgaḻadāyinī ।
sarvasammānitē dēvī padmāvati namō'stu tē ॥ 5 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O all-knowing one, O granter of all boons, O bestower of all auspiciousness, O honored by all, O Goddess — salutations to you, Padmāvatī.
contentBlocks.meanings: sarva-jñe: O all-knowing | sarva-varade: O granter of all boons | sarva-maṅgala-dāyinī: O bestower of all auspiciousness | sarva-sammānite: O honored by all | devī: O Goddess

contentBlocks.original:
सर्वहृद्दहरावासे सर्वपापभयापहे ।
अष्टैश्वर्यप्रदे लक्ष्मी पद्मावति नमोऽस्तु ते ॥ 6 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvahṛddaharāvāsē sarvapāpabhayāpahē ।
aṣṭaiśvaryapradē lakṣmī padmāvati namō'stu tē ॥ 6 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Dwelling in the small space (daharākāśa) within the hearts of all beings, remover of fear from all sins, granter of the eight-fold sovereignty (aṣṭa-aiśvarya), O Lakṣmī — salutations to you, Padmāvatī.
contentBlocks.meanings: sarva-hṛd-dahara-vāsa: dwelling in the small space within all hearts | sarva-pāpa-bhaya-āpaha: remover of fear from all sins | aṣṭa-aiśvarya-prade: granter of eight-fold sovereignty | lakṣmī: O Lakṣmī

contentBlocks.original:
देहि मे मोक्षसाम्राज्यं देहि त्वत्पाददर्शनम् ।
अष्टैश्वर्यं च मे देहि पद्मावति नमोऽस्तु ते ॥ 7 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dēhi mē mōkṣasāmrājyaṃ dēhi tvatpādadarśanam ।
aṣṭaiśvaryaṃ cha mē dēhi padmāvati namō'stu tē ॥ 7 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Grant me the sovereignty of liberation (mokṣa-sāmrājya), grant me the sight of your feet, and also grant me the eight-fold sovereignty — salutations to you, Padmāvatī.
contentBlocks.meanings: dehi me: grant me | mokṣa-sāmrājya: sovereignty of liberation | tvat-pāda-darśana: sight of your feet | aṣṭa-aiśvarya: eight-fold sovereignty

contentBlocks.original:
नक्रश्रवणनक्षत्रे कृतोद्वाहमहोत्सवे ।
कृपया पाहि नः पद्मे त्वद्भक्तिभरितान् रमे ॥ 8 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nakraśravaṇanakṣatrē kṛtōdvāhamahōtsavē ।
kṛpayā pāhi naḥ padmē tvadbhaktibharitān ramē ॥ 8 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: On the nakṣatra Śravaṇa in the month of Kārtika (the occasion of Padmāvatī's sacred wedding festival with Vēṅkaṭēśvara) — O Padmā, O Ramā, with your compassion, please protect us who are filled with devotion to you.
contentBlocks.meanings: nakra-śravaṇa-nakṣatra: the Śravaṇa asterism (in Kārtika month) | kṛta-udvāha-mahotsava: the great festival of the sacred marriage | kṛpayā: with compassion | pāhi naḥ: please protect us | tvad-bhakti-bhāritān: filled with devotion to you

contentBlocks.original:
इन्दिरे हेमवर्णाभे त्वां वन्दे परमात्मिकाम् ।
भवसागरमग्नं मां रक्ष रक्ष महेश्वरी ॥ 9 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
indirē hēmavarṇābhē tvāṃ vandē paramātmikām ।
bhavasāgaramagnaṃ māṃ rakṣa rakṣa mahēśvarī ॥ 9 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O Indirā (Lakṣmī), golden in your complexion, I bow to you — the Supreme Soul. O Maheśvarī — save me! Save me! I who am drowning in the ocean of worldly existence.
contentBlocks.meanings: indirā: Indirā (a name of Lakṣmī) | hema-varṇābhe: glowing with golden complexion | tvāṃ vande: I bow to you | paramātmikā: the Supreme Soul | bhava-sāgara-magna: drowning in the ocean of existence | rakṣa rakṣa: save! save! | maheśvarī: O Great Sovereign Goddess

contentBlocks.original:
कल्याणपुरवासिन्यै नारायण्यै श्रियै नमः ।
शृतिस्तुतिप्रगीतायै देवदेव्यै च मङ्गलम् ॥ 10 ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kaḻyāṇapuravāsinyai nārāyaṇyai śriyai namaḥ ।
śṛtistutipragītāyai dēvadēvyai cha maṅgaḻam ॥ 10 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Salutations to her who dwells in Kalyāṇapura, to Nārāyaṇī, to Śrī — and may there be auspiciousness to the goddess of goddesses, who is praised in all the Vedic hymns.
contentBlocks.meanings: kalyāṇa-pura-vāsinī: dweller in Kalyāṇapura (Tiruchanur) | nārāyaṇī: consort of Nārāyaṇa | śrī: the auspicious Goddess Śrī (Lakṣmī) | śruti-stuti-pragītā: praised in Vedic hymns | deva-devyai: to the goddess of goddesses | maṅgalam: auspiciousness
